name: OKEA ASA
summary: OKEA ASA, an oil and gas company, engages in the development and production of oil and gas in the Norwegian continental shelf. It holds interests 44.56% in Draugen, 12% in Gj√É¬∏a, and 0.55% in Ivar Aasen licenses. The company also has 18 exploration licenses with prospects being evaluated for drilling. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Trondheim, Norway.
